project.description: An orchestration layer for AI coding assistants (currently Claude Code) that enforces consistency, reliability, and more predictable outputs through 7 production bundles with skills, agents, and commands.

default.responsibility: Root Python project providing build orchestration, test infrastructure, and pyprojectx-based toolchain for all marketplace bundles

default.purpose_reasoning: Root project with pyproject.toml, aggregates all bundles under marketplace/bundles/ and tests under test/

test.description: Pytest test suites organized per bundle with shared fixtures and conftest
